mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (base_id, name, file_name, file_type, doc_count, created_at) VALUES (#{baseId}, #{name}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{docCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT base_id, name, description, file_name, file_type, owner_type, owner_id, doc_count, created_at FROM knowledge_base WHERE base_id = #{baseId}
